title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Pizza Hut India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bengaluru. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pizza Hut India:
Pizza Hut India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India!
